posts.name: Olena Karacheban
posts.text:
Dear experts,
apologies, if I did not understand it from the help menu…
Is there MultiDimFit option, which restricts the bet fit to be positive defined?
Thank you in advance!
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

apologies, if I did not understand it from the help menu…
Is there MultiDimFit option, which restricts the bet fit to be positive defined?

Thank you in advance!

posts.name: Andrea Carlo Marini
posts.text:
Hi Olena,
if you want a parameter in a certain range, you can use the --setParameterRanges option to set it.
The minimization will try to find the minimum inside that region, if it exist.
Cheers,
-Andrea
posts.cooked_html:
